meta.purpose: Capability validation checklist for the first model-specific product pages: IEIO-100, IER-100 and IEG-100.
meta.important_note: Use this checklist before drafting or publishing model-specific Markdown product pages. A page can move to Markdown drafting only when required checks are passed or explicitly marked conditional with a safe wording rule.

status_values.pass: Evidence is available and the claim can be used.
status_values.conditional: Claim can be used only with limited wording.
status_values.blocked: Cannot validate without engineering decision, prototype, test result or documentation.

global_required_checks.claim: No first-generation product page should claim 5G support.
4G, WiFi and LoRa/LoRaWAN are separate wireless uplink variants.
global_required_checks.evidence: Product naming and connectivity rules define one wireless uplink per device.

global_required_checks.claim: Electrical ratings, certifications, temperature range, relay rating, analog accuracy and IP rating remain validation-gated.
global_required_checks.evidence: Claim policy in engineering and publishing plan.

required_checks.claim: IEIO-100 first generation includes DI8, DO8, AI4 and AO4 variants.
IEIO-100 supports Modbus RTU over RS485.
required_checks.safe_wording: Designed for Modbus RTU over RS485; final register map and firmware behavior require validation.

required_checks.claim: IEIO-100 has an Ethernet/Modbus TCP variant.
required_checks.safe_wording: Ethernet/Modbus TCP variant is planned as an optional variant.
Do not publish relay rating yet.

required_checks.claim: AI/AO accuracy, resolution and load capability.
required_checks.safe_wording: Do not publish analog accuracy, AO resolution or load capability yet.

required_checks.claim: IEIO-100 works as an MQTT/cloud gateway.
required_checks.safe_wording: Do not claim MQTT/cloud gateway behavior for IEIO-100.

drafting_decision.reason: Variant strategy is confirmed, but Modbus register map, relay rating and analog performance are not validated.
drafting_decision.allowed_page_scope_before_validation: Brief and internal planning only; no final product page.

required_checks.claim: IER-100 is an Ethernet-only wired RTU.
required_checks.safe_wording: Ethernet-only wired RTU for LAN/SCADA cabinet deployments.

required_checks.claim: IER-100 supports Modbus RTU and Modbus TCP.
required_checks.safe_wording: Planned Modbus RTU/TCP support; final mode and register behavior require firmware validation.
MQTT telemetry is optional after validation.

required_checks.claim: Relay rating and analog input accuracy.
required_checks.safe_wording: Do not publish relay rating or analog accuracy yet.
Do not claim DNP3, IEC 60870 or IEC 61850 support.

drafting_decision.reason: Core positioning is confirmed, but Modbus firmware behavior and electrical ratings are not validated.
drafting_decision.allowed_page_scope_before_validation: Brief and internal planning only; no final product page.

required_checks.safe_wording: Ethernet-only wired gateway for LAN and industrial Ethernet deployments.
Planned 1x isolated RS485 interface; final isolation rating requires validation.

required_checks.claim: IEG-100 collects Modbus RTU/TCP data and publishes MQTT.
required_checks.safe_wording: Planned Modbus RTU/TCP to MQTT gateway behavior; final polling limits and payload behavior require firmware validation.

required_checks.claim: IEG-100 supports OPC UA, BACnet or CAN.
required_checks.safe_wording: Do not claim OPC UA, BACnet or CAN on IEG-100.

required_checks.claim: IEG-100 is a heavy IO gateway.
required_checks.safe_wording: Do not position IEG-100 as a heavy IO gateway; keep IO optional/light.

drafting_decision.reason: Product role is confirmed, but Modbus/MQTT firmware behavior, polling limits and payload format are not validated.
drafting_decision.allowed_page_scope_before_validation: Brief and internal planning only; no final product page.

next_actions: Review and validate ieio-100-modbus-register-map-draft.json with engineering before using exact register claims in public product pages.
Review and validate ieg-100-modbus-mqtt-behavior-draft.json with engineering before using exact polling, point-count or MQTT payload claims in public product pages.
Use first-product-prototype-test-report-templates.json when real prototype testing begins, then update this checklist with completed report filenames.
